Check Description Category Site Value Source Value Difference Status
eia_price_match Gas price from whatchanged.us vs EIA API for the same area (BOSTON). Tolerance: ±$0.05/gal. gas 3.861 3.861 0.0 $/gal (tol: 0.05) PASS
aaa_cross_check Cross-check gas price against AAA NH state average. No matching metro found for site region 'boston'. gas 3.861 3.747 0.114 $/gal (tol: 0.6) PASS

local_vs_national_unemployment Local unemployment rate vs national average. A difference > 10pp would be unusual and likely indicates a data mapping error. national 2.6 4.4 1.8 percentage points (tol: 10.0) PASS
local_vs_national_grocery_direction Local grocery CPI % change vs national — both should move in the same direction. Disagreement may indicate a series mapping error. national 0.4 2.56 — PASS
local_vs_national_gas Local gas price vs national average. A difference > $2/gal is unusual and may indicate a regional data error. national 3.861 4.096 0.235 $/gal (tol: 2.0) PASS

tariff_audit_block Verify tariff estimate from the API's _audit.computations block matches an independent calculation. computation_audit 1762 1762 0 PASS
metro_match_groceries Verify BLS series CUURS11ASAF11 actually maps to the metro area the site claims ('Boston-Cambridge-Newton'). A mismatch means data from the wrong city. metro_mapping Boston-Cambridge-Newton Boston-Cambridge-Newton, MA-NH — PASS

Check Description Category Site Value Source Value Difference Status
eia_price_match Gas price from whatchanged.us vs EIA API for the same area (PADD 2). Tolerance: ±$0.05/gal. gas 3.772 3.772 0.0 $/gal (tol: 0.05) PASS
aaa_cross_check Cross-check gas price against AAA OK state average. No matching metro found for site region 'padd 2'. gas 3.772 3.263 0.509 $/gal (tol: 0.6) PASS
grocery_index_match BLS CPI grocery index value from the site vs directly from the BLS API for the same series ID. cpi 278.367 278.367 0.0 index points (tol: 0.01) PASS
grocery_pct_change_internal Internal consistency: does the displayed grocery % change match (current - baseline) / baseline x 100? cpi 2.8 2.8 0.0 percentage points (tol: 0.1) PASS
shelter_data_present Confirms BLS shelter CPI series has data. The site shows shelter cost % change from this series. cpi — View source — PASS
shelter_change_reasonable Sanity check: shelter % change is between -20% and +50%. cpi -0.2 — — PASS
bls_laus_match Unemployment rate from whatchanged.us vs directly from BLS LAUS (Local Area Unemployment Statistics) for the same county. unemployment 3.7 3.7 0.0 percentage points (tol: 0.005) PASS
income_vs_census Median household income used by the site vs Census ACS 5-year estimate (table B19013) for this zip code. tariff 92083 92083.0 0.0 dollars (tol: 2000.0) PASS
tariff_vs_yale_method Site's tariff estimate vs independent calculation using Census income x Yale Budget Lab rate (2.05% of household income). tariff 1888 1888 0 dollars/yr (tol: 200.0) PASS
tariff_display_vs_api Tariff estimate shown on the rendered page vs the API response (checks for display/rounding bugs). rendered 1888.0 1888.0 0.0 PASS
gas_price_display Gas price shown on the rendered page vs the API response (checks for display/rounding bugs). rendered 3.77 3.77 0.0 PASS

national_unemployment_present Verify national unemployment nationalSeries is present in the API response. national 73 View source — PASS
national_unemployment_freshness Most recent national unemployment data point should be within 60 days. national 51 View source — PASS
national_unemployment_range Sanity check: national unemployment rate should be between 0.0 and 15.0 %. national 4.4 View source — PASS
national_cpi_present Verify national CPI nationalSeries is present in the API response. national 73 View source — PASS
national_cpi_freshness Most recent national CPI data point should be within 60 days. national 51 View source — PASS
national_cpi_grocery_range Sanity check: national grocery CPI index should be between 200.0 and 500.0 index points. national 318.898 View source — PASS
national_cpi_shelter_range Sanity check: national shelter CPI index should be between 200.0 and 500.0 index points. national 422.776 View source — PASS
national_gas_present Verify national gas price nationalSeries is present in the API response. national 260 View source — PASS
national_gas_freshness Most recent national gas price data point should be within 14 days. national 1 View source — PASS
national_gas_range Sanity check: national gas price should be between 1.0 and 10.0 $/gal. national 4.096 View source — PASS
local_vs_national_unemployment Local unemployment rate vs national average. A difference > 10pp would be unusual and likely indicates a data mapping error. national 3.7 4.4 0.7 percentage points (tol: 10.0) PASS
local_vs_national_grocery_direction Local grocery CPI % change vs national — both should move in the same direction. Disagreement may indicate a series mapping error. national 2.8 2.56 — PASS
local_vs_national_gas Local gas price vs national average. A difference > $2/gal is unusual and may indicate a regional data error. national 3.772 4.096 0.324 $/gal (tol: 2.0) PASS
gas_change_audit_block Verify gas change from the API's _audit.computations block matches an independent calculation. computation_audit 0.708 0.708 0.0 PASS
tariff_audit_block Verify tariff estimate from the API's _audit.computations block matches an independent calculation. computation_audit 1888 1888 0 PASS
metro_match_groceries Verify BLS series CUURS37ASAF11 actually maps to the metro area the site claims ('Dallas-Fort Worth-Arlington'). A mismatch means data from the wrong city. metro_mapping Dallas-Fort Worth-Arlington Dallas-Fort Worth-Arlington, TX — PASS
metro_match_shelter Verify BLS series CUURS37ASAH1 actually maps to the metro area the site claims ('Dallas-Fort Worth-Arlington'). A mismatch means data from the wrong city. metro_mapping Dallas-Fort Worth-Arlington Dallas-Fort Worth-Arlington, TX — PASS
metro_match_energy Verify BLS series CUURS37ASA0E actually maps to the metro area the site claims ('Dallas-Fort Worth-Arlington'). A mismatch means data from the wrong city. metro_mapping Dallas-Fort Worth-Arlington Dallas-Fort Worth-Arlington, TX — PASS

local_vs_national_unemployment Local unemployment rate vs national average. A difference > 10pp would be unusual and likely indicates a data mapping error. national 4.9 4.4 0.5 percentage points (tol: 10.0) PASS
local_vs_national_grocery_direction Local grocery CPI % change vs national — both should move in the same direction. Disagreement may indicate a series mapping error. national 1.2 2.56 — PASS

metro_match_shelter Verify BLS series CUURS49DSAH1 actually maps to the metro area the site claims ('Seattle-Tacoma-Bellevue'). A mismatch means data from the wrong city. metro_mapping Seattle-Tacoma-Bellevue Seattle-Tacoma-Bellevue WA — PASS
